stance_by_source.summary: Took the short from the 66.6k supply down to the 1H breaker and banked it; wants a reload if price flips back above ~66.3k, or to short 69k if reached. Trend down, sellers in control, lows building to be swept. Leveraged/range idea, not spot.
10x short from the 12H supply at 66,758 (entry 66,619) targeting the 0.786 fib / blue breaker around 64,400 — closed +28%.
Daily trend explicitly bearish, momentum with sellers, demand melted. For spot: don't chase — wait and accumulate lower, around 60k then 59k, deeper into summer.
Short at $66,619 off the 12H supply, closed in profit (1.5% risk). Flagged as a 10x/short instrument — context only, not a spot trade for you.
Historical grades through 2025–26 ranged from longs at 80k–120k to shorts — all anchored to much higher prices and now stale; BTC has since fallen to ~64.6k, so those buy levels are superseded.

conflicts: The short's entry zone (66.3–66.8k supply) now sits ABOVE current price (~64.6k) — the setup has already played out and been closed in profit, so there is no clean short entry right now without a bounce back into supply.
Older grades (longs at 80k–120k through 2025–early 2026) are stale and overridden by the current bearish higher-timeframe read; BTC has dropped to ~64.6k, making those buy levels irrelevant.

Direction itself is NOT contested — every recent source (06-15 through 06-22) agrees the trend is down; the only divergence is spot vs leverage: the spot plan is to wait and accumulate near 59–60k, while the short is a leverage-only idea not for a spot account.
plain_english: Every recent read points the same way: Bitcoin's bigger trend is down and sellers are in control, so this is a sell-the-bounce situation, not a buy. But the actual short trades — selling around $66,300–$66,800 — have already happened and been closed for profit, and price has since dropped to about $64,600. The good place to sell short has passed; chasing it here in the middle of the range is poor risk. Wait for price to push back up into roughly $66,300–$69,000 before considering a fresh short — and note this is a leveraged short idea, not a spot buy; if you only buy and hold, the plan is to do nothing now and accumulate much lower, around $59,000–$60,000.
